meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to build high-converting user onboarding to overcome a lack of portfolio. An Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: To overcome a lack of portfolio, build a high-impact, reusable user onboarding flow. By leveraging AI-assisted tools like Antigravity and Claude Code, you can ship professional-grade UX in hours. This demonstrates technical competence and product-thinking, proving to clients that you don't just write code—you build business outcomes.
content.intro:
The blank screen of a portfolio is the freelancer's greatest adversary. You have the skills, but without a track record, clients see a risk instead of a solution. The secret to breaking this cycle isn't building a dozen clones; it's building one high-fidelity, highly functional onboarding experience that demonstrates deep product empathy.

By focusing on the user's first five minutes, you prove you understand retention, conversion, and architectural elegance. We will use Antigravity to scaffold the logic and Claude Code to iterate at the speed of thought, turning a 'no portfolio' problem into a 'product expert' credential.

steps.title: Define the Value-Driven Onboarding Flow
steps.description: Map the shortest path from sign-up to 'Aha!' moment. We focus on low-friction input and immediate gratification.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a schema for a 3-step user onboarding flow that collects user intent, sets preferences, and triggers a personalized dashboard state.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Generate a React component for a 3-step onboarding wizard with Framer Motion transitions.'

steps.title: Build the State Machine Logic
steps.description: Implement robust state management to handle user progression, ensuring no data is lost during the onboarding process.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a state management hook for a multi-step onboarding form with validation and local storage persistence.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Refactor this onboarding state to use Zod for validation and persistent local storage sync.'

steps.title: Integrate High-Velocity UI Components
steps.description: Use modern design patterns to ensure the onboarding feels premium and professional.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a reusable progress indicator component and a set of card-based selection inputs for user preferences.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Style these components using Tailwind CSS to look like a high-end SaaS product.'

steps.title: Implement Analytics Hooks
steps.description: Prove your product-thinking by tracking conversion at every step of the onboarding funnel.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add event tracking hooks to the onboarding steps to capture drop-off rates and completion metrics.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Inject PostHog tracking events into the onboarding progression handlers.'

steps.title: Final Polish and Performance Audit
steps.description: Optimize the bundle size and ensure the flow is performant on mobile devices to impress high-end clients.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the onboarding flow for performance bottlenecks and suggest lazy-loading strategies.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Analyze the component tree and implement code splitting for the onboarding pages.'

pro_tips: Always include a 'Skip' button; forcing users through onboarding is a major conversion killer.
Use optimistic UI updates to make your onboarding feel instantaneous, even if the backend is slow.
Show, don't tell: add a 'mini-tour' overlay that highlights one key feature of your app.
Save the most complex setup steps for 'Day 2' to keep the initial onboarding under 60 seconds.
Document your design decisions in the README; clients love seeing the 'why' behind the 'how'.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is live, deploy it to a custom domain and add a 'Case Study' page to your portfolio site detailing the business problem you solved with this flow.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the perfect project to fall into your lap. Build the portfolio that wins the contracts you deserve by mastering the art of the onboarding flow. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
